message:
fix(mcp): harden refresh cooldown and apply rustfmt across MCP modules

mcp.rs:
- Fix check_refresh_cooldown to handle future timestamps (clock skew
  or persisted refresh_ms ahead of current time) by clamping elapsed
  to non-negative, preventing negative elapsed from bypassing cooldown
- Treat non-positive cooldown_ms as "disabled" (return None) instead
  of performing meaningless division
- Clamp remaining time to non-negative for display consistency
- Add tests for future-timestamp clamping and zero/negative cooldown

mcp_bridge.rs, mcp_middleware.rs, mcp_missions.rs, mcp_resources.rs,
mcp_types.rs:
- Apply rustfmt formatting (line wrapping, import sorting, assert_eq
  layout normalization)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
